ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer's address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "annual_income" TEXT /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first became a customer */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a member of a loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the customer has earned */,
  "preferred_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for the purchase */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used during the purchase */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the purchase */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the purchase */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used during the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the purchase record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the purchase record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address for shipping */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the shipping address */,
  "primary_address" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary shipping address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work, billing) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address for geo-targeting */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address for geo-targeting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction log */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, call, visit) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the interaction */,
  "interaction_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the interaction (e.g., email, phone, social media) */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending, escalated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "actual_spend" TEXT /* Actual amount spent on the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., email, social media, in-store) */,
  "campaign_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the campaign (e.g., increase sales, improve customer retention) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign segment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the segment belongs to */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for segmenting customers (e.g., purchase history, location) */,
  "segment_size" INTEGER /* Number of customers in the segment */,
  "segment_performance" TEXT /* Performance of the segment (e.g., conversion rate, response rate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the segment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the segment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_segments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of support request (e.g., product issue, account problem) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date and time the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, resolved, in progress) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the request was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the request and resolution */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the support request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to handle the request */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the request in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, customer service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose information was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
